backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point placeholder with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the placeholder logo with the official DMTI logo in Navbar and Footer components, with high confidence and linked test ID REQ-5.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each component's purpose, styling, and recent changes like logo and Tailwind class updates.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Digital Marketing Town Institute' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the LandingPage as the sole page of the single-page application.
Displays a six-course grid with icons, descriptions, topics, duration, and level, plus an enroll CTA that scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/CTABanner.tsx: Full-width orange gradient CTA section with a 'Limited Seats Available' badge, headline, and buttons for enrollment and FAQ navigation.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion FAQ section with eight questions covering course details, certifications, placement, and support, with open/close toggle state.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column footer displaying the official DMTI logo, social links, quick links, course list, and contact information with smooth-scroll navigation.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component for the DMTI landing page featuring a background image, headline, CTA buttons (Enroll Now, Learn More), and stats (students, courses, placement rate) with smooth-scroll navigation.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, an Enroll Now CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu that smooth-scrolls to page sections.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials section displaying a 3-column grid of six student review cards with avatar initials, star ratings, quotes, and role/company details.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Section highlighting six DMTI differentiators (expert instructors, flexible learning, certification, placement, mentorship, live projects) in a responsive card grid with icons and highlight badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks for ICP-based auth.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Inter and Syne fonts, defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a dark navy/orange theme, and utility classes for gradients, card hover effects, and text gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component that composes all major sections (Navbar, Hero, WhyChooseUs, CoursesOverview, Testimonials, CTABanner, FAQ, Footer) into a single full-page layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Inter, Syne), an extended color palette using oklch CSS variables plus brand-specific tokens (orange, yellow, navy), and custom shadows/border radii.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) tracking the summary, existing features, architectural notes, and image requirements for the Digital Marketing Town Institute landing page build.
